CLUMSY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] turn 1. In hand: random discard when you play.
OBSESSION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Obsession
OBSESSION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. This card's cost increases by 1{Energy:energyIcons()}. When drawn, gain {ObsessionDrawEnergy:energyIcons()}. While this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], you must play it first.

MEDIOCRE_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] for 1 turn. While in your [gold]Hand[/gold], you can play at most [blue]3[/blue] cards per turn.
BELL_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Curse of the Bell
BELL_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. When added from a card reward, obtain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Common[/gold], [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Uncommon[/gold], and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] [gold]Relic[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] in combat. [gold]Eternal[/gold].
BAD_LUCK_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Bad Luck
BAD_LUCK_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] for 1 turn. At end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], lose [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] HP.
BAD_LUCK_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Curse[/gold]. Turn 1 [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. End of turn in hand: [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] HP.
INFECTION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Infection
INFECTION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. This card gains the same animated border as the [gold]Infection[/gold] status card.
MAGIC_CORRUPTION_ENCHANTMENT.title: Magic Corruption
MAGIC_CORRUPTION_ENCHANTMENT.description:
This card's cost becomes [blue]3[/blue]{Energy:energyIcons()}.
When played, gain the [gold]Magic Corruption[/gold] buff and remove this card from combat.
Buff: your [gold]enchanted[/gold] cards cost [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Stars[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played (Powers keep their normal destination).
MAGIC_CORRUPTION_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardTe:
Costs [blue]3[/blue]{Energy:energyIcons()}.
On play: gain [gold]Magic Corruption[/gold] and remove self from combat.
Buff: enchanted cards cost [blue]0[/blue] / [blue]0[/blue] Stars and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played.
FINALE_CURTAIN_ENCHANTMENT.title: Splendid
FINALE_CURTAIN_ENCHANTMENT.description: During [gold]combat[/gold], while your draw pile is empty, damage you deal and [gold]Block[/gold] you gain from playing this card are tripled.
FINALE_CURTAIN_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: In combat, empty draw pile: [gold]Attack[/gold] damage and [gold]Block[/gold] from this card x[blue]3[/blue].
SHAME_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Shame
SHAME_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. This card's cost is reduced by [blue]1[/blue]{Energy:energyIcons()}. When you play this card, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold].
DOUBT_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Doubt
DOUBT_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. When drawn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card. When you play this card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
FOLLY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Folly
FOLLY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Eternal[/gold]. This combat, its cost starts at [blue]0[/blue] and increases by [blue]1[/blue] each time it is played. When played, return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
FOLLY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Retain[/gold], [gold]Eternal[/gold]. Cost starts [blue]0[/blue], +[blue]1[/blue] per play this combat; returns to hand when played.
DEBT_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Debt
GREED_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Greed
GREED_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. When drawn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}; at the start of your next turn, lose that much [gold]Energy[/gold].
GREED_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: When drawn: gain {Energy:energyIcons()}; next turn start: lose the same [gold]Energy[/gold].
POOR_SLEEP_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Poor Sleep
POOR_SLEEP_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description:
[gold]Curse[/gold]. Each time you play this card during the current [gold]Act[/gold], the HP you heal from resting at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold] that [gold]Act[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] (stacks; resets in a new [gold]Act[/gold]).
This [gold]Act[/gold] so far: [blue]{PoorSleepPlays:diff()}[/blue] (rest heal is reduced by the same amount).
POOR_SLEEP_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardTe: This [gold]Act[/gold]: [blue]{PoorSleepPlays:diff()}[/blue] plays · rest heal [blue]-{PoorSleepPlays:diff()}[/blue] · resets next [gold]Act[/gold]
POOR_SLEEP_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.additionalR: [Poor Sleep]: Heal [blue]{PoorSleepPlays:diff()}[/blue] less HP from resting this [gold]Act[/gold].
DECAY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Decay
DECAY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. Your [gold]Strength[/gold]-modified attacks deal double damage. When played, lose [blue]4[/blue] HP. At the end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], take [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage.
DECAY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Strength[/gold] attacks x[blue]2[/blue]. On play: [blue]4[/blue] HP. End of turn in hand: [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage.
REGRET_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Regret
REGRET_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. At the end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], lose HP equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REGRET_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: End of turn in hand: lose HP equal to hand size.
ANGUISH_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Anguish
ANGUISH_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Innate[/gold]. While this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], whenever you play another card this turn, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
ANGUISH_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Innate[/gold]. In hand: each other card played this turn, [blue]-1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
GUILT_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Guilty
GUILT_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description:
[gold]Curse[/gold]. Like [gold]Touch of Insanity[/gold]: during combat, this card's Energy cost becomes {Energy:energyIcons()} and its Stars cost becomes 0[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img], until combat ends.
Removed from your [gold]Deck[/gold] after {Combats:diff()} {Combats:plural:combat|combats}.
GUILT_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText:
This combat: Energy {Energy:energyIcons()}, Stars 0[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] (same as Touch of Insanity).
Removed from [gold]Deck[/gold] after {Combats:diff()} {Combats:plural:combat|combats}.

DUEL_STRENGTH_ENCHANTMENT.description: Uncommon. When played, gain [blue]{StrengthPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]; each targeted enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEMON_SHIELD_SHARE_BLOCK_ENCHANTMENT.des: Uncommon. Multiplayer only. [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Lose [blue]1[/blue] HP; a [gold]chosen[/gold] teammate gains [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold].
DEMON_SHIELD_SHARE_BLOCK_ENCHANTMENT.ext: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Lose [blue]1[/blue] HP; [gold]pick[/gold] a teammate to gain your [gold]Block[/gold].

REAPER_DOOM_ON_DAMAGE_ENCHANTMENT.descri: Rare. Only on cards with play damage. When your attack deals damage, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to half the damage dealt.
EAGER_PER_ATTACK_ENERGY_ENCHANTMENT.desc: Uncommon. This card costs [blue]+1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold]. When played, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] for each [gold]Attack[/gold] in your hand.
POUNCE_NEXT_SKILL_FREE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Pounce
POUNCE_NEXT_SKILL_FREE_ENCHANTMENT.descr: Uncommon. [gold]Attacks[/gold] only; base cost at least [blue]2[/blue]. After you play this, your next [gold]Skill[/gold] costs [blue]0[/blue].
PINCER_FLANKING_MARK_ENCHANTMENT.title: Pincer
PINCER_FLANKING_MARK_ENCHANTMENT.descrip: Uncommon. Multiplayer only. Costs [blue]+1[/blue]. Apply [gold]Flanking[/gold] (other players' attacks to that enemy deal double damage).
